_publications._publicationTitle: Acceptance and commitment therapy in youth with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and chronic pain and their parents: A pilot study of feasibility and preliminary efficacy.

_contextSnippet: the mean rating of how much patients liked participating in the study was 3.9 out of 5 (SD = 1.3, range 1–5). The mean parent rating was 4.6 out of 5 (SD = 0.51, range 4–5)
details: Patient satisfaction rating mean 3.9 out of 5 (SD = 1.3, range 1-5); parent satisfaction rating mean 4.6 out of 5 (SD = 0.51, range 4-5)
